config.animationframework.title: Animation Framework
config.animationframework.force_vanilla_: Force vanilla entity textures (ignore resource packs)
config.animationframework.auto_switch_th: Auto switch to third person on animation start
debug.animationframework.server_cannot_r: [AFW] Server can't receive stop-all packets (mod not installed server-side).
[AFW] Server can't receive stop-instance packets (mod not installed server-side).
debug.animationframework.target_not_livi: [AFW] Target is not a living entity.
debug.animationframework.animation_selec: [AFW] Animation selected. Add extra actors then press start to join.
debug.animationframework.no_extra_actors: [AFW] No extra actors selected for join.
debug.animationframework.server_cannot_r: [AFW] Server can't receive join packets (mod not installed server-side).
[AFW] Server can't receive debug packets (mod not installed server-side).
debug.animationframework.no_active_insta: [AFW] No active instance to adjust speed.
debug.animationframework.server_cannot_r: [AFW] Server can't receive speed packets (mod missing server-side).
debug.animationframework.stage_sequence_: [AFW] Stage sequence ended locally; server stop unavailable.
debug.animationframework.queue_enqueue_f: [AFW] Queue enqueue failed: exactly one player actor is required.
[AFW] Queue enqueue failed: queue is full (cap=%s).
[AFW] Queue enqueue failed: player actor is missing.
debug.animationframework.queue_enqueue_d: [AFW] Queue enqueue denied: %s is already queued for another player.
debug.animationframework.matched_unpatha: [AFW] Matched %s but an actor can't pathfind (not a mob/player).
debug.animationframework.matched_multipl: [AFW] Matched %s but multiple players are not supported yet.
[AFW] Matched %s with actors %s -> direct multiplayer debug start.
debug.animationframework.start_cancelled: [AFW] Start cancelled: block_requirements cannot be combined with water requirement.
[AFW] Start cancelled: no valid wall placement found for %s (actors: %s).
[AFW] Start cancelled: no valid center support placement found for %s (actors: %s).
[AFW] Start cancelled: selected players must be within %s blocks of requester.
debug.animationframework.join_failed_no_: [AFW] Join failed: no such active instance.
debug.animationframework.join_denied_sta: [AFW] Join denied: current stage does not allow joins.
debug.animationframework.join_failed_pla: [AFW] Join failed: player actors not supported for joins.
debug.animationframework.join_failed_no_: [AFW] Join failed: no definition for expanded actor set.
debug.animationframework.instance_in_dif: [AFW] Instance is in a different world; can't stop from here.
debug.animationframework.start_cancelled: [AFW] Start cancelled: water requirement not met.
[AFW] Start cancelled: animation not allowed in water.
[AFW] Start cancelled: not enough space for %s (actors: %s).
debug.animationframework.queue_skipped_m: [AFW] Queue skipped for %s (actors: %s): missing non-player actor.
debug.animationframework.queue_skipped_n: [AFW] Queue skipped for %s (actors: %s): no actors resolved.
debug.animationframework.queue_skipped_r: [AFW] Queue skipped for %s (actors: %s): requirements not met.
